telltalePatterns: Full rhoticity in coda positions such as 'together' [təˈɡɛðɚ]

prosody.fluencyNotes: Natural connected speech with standard linking and elision; no non-native hesitations observed.

strengths: Native-standard realization of voiced dental fricatives /ð/
Natural sentence-level stress and pitch contours

recommendedFocus.reason: Speaker demonstrates native-level phonetic and prosodic competence in General American English.

result.transcript: It's funny how some people always seem to have their lives together. Well, I'm just trying to find my matching socks.
